chapter_title.en: Chapter 68 – Goodly relationship with the relatives

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/369)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/369)
text: قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّ الرَّحِمَ مُعَلَّقَةٌ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ بِالْعَرْشِ تَقُولُ اللَّهُمَّ صِلْ مَنْ وَصَلَنِي وَ اقْطَعْ مَنْ قَطَعَنِي .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad Bin Isa, from Hareyz Bin Abdullah, from Fuzayl Bin Yasaar who said,

‘Abu Ja’far<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> said: ‘The womb (kinship of the Progeny<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> of Muhammad<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup>) would attach itself to the Throne on the Day of Judgement, saying, ‘O Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup>! Maintain with the one who maintained me, and Cut off from the one who cut me off’.
en.sarwar: 10. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Hammad ibn ‘Isa from Hariz ibn ‘Abd Allah from Fudayl ibn Yasar who has said the following: “Abu Ja’far (a.s.) has said, ‘Kindred relation will hold to the Throne (of the Lord) on the Day of Judgment and say, “O Lord, establish good relations with those who establish me and cut off good relations with those who cut me off.’”
